scripts.build: pnpm --filter @guga-agent/core build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-memory-candidates build && tsc -p tsconfig.json && node ../../scripts/fix-esm-extensions.mjs dist
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @guga-agent/core build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-memory-candidates build && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @guga-agent/core build && pnpm --filter @guga-agent/plugin-memory-candidates build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
